title: phleum haenkeanum
intro: Phleum haenkeanum, also known as Haenke's Timothy grass, is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Phleum haenkeanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Phleum haenkeanum typically involve its leaves and stems being dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
